import json, sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
l=d['ledger']
accounts = [e for e in l['accountState'] if e.get\('LedgerEntryType'\) == 'AccountRoot']
print\('OLD LEDGER \(from git\):'\)
print\(f'  Keys: {sorted\(l.keys\(\)\)}'\)
print\(f'  total_coins: {l.get\(\\"totalCoins\\", l.get\(\\"total_coins\\", \\"?\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(f'  accepted: {l.get\(\\"accepted\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'  Accounts: {len\(accounts\)}'\)
print\(f'  Total objects: {len\(l[\\"accountState\\"]\)}'\)
print\(f'  First account balance: {accounts[0][\\"Balance\\"] if accounts else \\"?\\"}'\)" 2>&1)
